name: run-pipeline
description: Internal: run pipeline-run.js for a given template family + input folder. Called by pipeline-1x1, pipeline-9x16, etc.

args.name: template
args.description: Template family name, e.g. TemplateC, TemplateB

args.name: input_folder
args.description: Drive Input folder name, e.g. Input_1:1, Input_9:16

args.name: lang
args.description: Language suffix for output filenames, e.g. ru, de
